study_title: Apis mellifera ligustica Transcriptome or Gene expression
exp_title: Uncovering the immune responses of Apis mellifera ligustica larval gut to Ascosphaera apis infection utilizing transcriptome sequencing
design: Previously, 4-day-old larval gut of Apis mellifera ligustica and 4-, 5- and 6-day-old larval gut of Apis mellifera ligustica challenged by Ascosphaera apis were prepared. In this study, 5- and 6-day-old larval gut of Apis mellifera ligustica were prepared for RNA sequencing using Illumina HiseqTM 2500 platform.
sample_title: 5-day-old larval gut of Apis mellifera ligustica
sample_description: 5-day-old larval gut of Apis mellifera ligustica
